name: Cabbage-Filled Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems and cut off the tops of the peppers. Remove the seeds without breaking the shells.
2. Finely chop the cabbage as for slaw and mix it with the salt and mustard seeds in a bowl until combined thoroughly.
3. Place the mixture into the peppers, pressing it in tightly.
4. Replace the tops on the pepper cases and secure them with toothpicks.
5. Place the filled peppers upright in a stone jar and cover with cold vinegar.
6. Put the lid over the jar and store in a cool place until ready to use. They can be kept for several months before using.
